text.p: APPLICATION FOR AN ACADEMIC STAFF POSITION.
I humbly wish to apply as one of the Institution's Assistant Lecturers in the Dramatic Arts Department.

As would be clear from the enclosed resume, I have a professional certificate, a Radio, Television and Film Production, as well as a Bachelor and Master's degree, at the Obafemi Awolowo University, Ile-Ife and the University of Ibadan respectively. During these periods, I had immense theoretical and practical experience in the theatre. More so, under the tutelage of theatre icons like Foluke Ogunleye, Oku Atai, Bayo Afolabi, Kola Oyewo, Lanrele Bamidele, Mathew Omukoro, Dele Layiwola, Femi Osofisan and the Late Ola Rotimi to mention but a few.

In view of the above and coupled with my other qualifications and experience, I shall be useful and will perform creditably will in the following areas of specialization: Script writing (Radio, Television, Stage and the Print Media), Theatre Arts Theory and Criticism, Film Theory and Criticism, Acting and Speech Arts, Radio, Television and Film Production as well as in other academic and administrative duties that would be assigned to me.
I shall be very much obliged if this application is given due consideration as I crave to be a member of academic staff in Africa's number one citadel of learning, Obafemi Awolowo University.
Thanks for the anticipated and favourable response.
